message:
🐛 Fix auth infinite loop + CardWrapper state comparison + AlertsDataFetcher

- Wrap setDemoMode in useCallback to prevent refreshUser deps changing
- Add shallow comparison in reportCallback to prevent no-op state updates
- Remove onData from AlertsDataFetcher useEffect deps (stable setState)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
